title: Earn Double-Digit Income With Options (October 2023)
text: We explain why selling cash-covered puts and covered calls are relatively safe choices for earning a high income. We will discuss how to formulate a sustainable and repeatable options income strategy. In this monthly series, we present how to go about selecting the right kind of stocks for options income. We present two lists of 10 stocks with multiple scenarios: PUT options, CALL options, and deep-in-the-money CALL options.

title: 3 Biotech Stocks to Watch Ahead of Potential Obesity Drug Approvals
text: The companies that already have obesity drugs can't keep up with the demand for their treatments, and the demand for the drugs is only likely to become more intense. That's because over 42% of the U.S. population was obese as of 2020, while the pervasive publicity around these drugs will make them more popular, and the social and political pressure for insurers to cover the treatments will become more intense.

title: Neumora Therapeutics stock surges as Amgen confirmed as major holder of the novel depression drug developer
text: Neumora Therapeutics stock advanced as much as 16% in Wednesday morning's trade after it was revealed that Amgen Inc (NASDAQ:AMGN) holds a material stake in the company. Amgen was an investor in Neumora's IPO last week, adding to an existing holding, to give it a 23.2% stake in the neuroscience drug discovery company, according to a filing.

title: Amgen discloses more than $400 million stake in recent IPO Neumora Therapeutics

title: Nvidia and Amgen back AI drug developer Generate:Biomedicines' $273M financing
text: Generate:Biomedicines said it has raised $273 million to fund its pipeline of programs in preclinical and clinical development across oncology, immunology, and infectious disease, including filing multiple Investigational New Drug (IND) applications with the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) and initiating multiple clinical trials annually. The Somerville, Massachusetts-based firm, which uses a machine learning-powered generative biology platform for drug generation, said the Series C fundraising attracted new investors, notably NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA)'s venture capital arm NVentures, Amgen, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMGN), MAPS Capital (Mirae Asset Group) and Pictet Alternative Advisors.

title: Analysis: FTC settlement could shelter Amgen from US price cuts, taxes
